Business Card Templates

Standard business card size: 3.5" x 2" (89mm x 51mm). Print at 300 DPI for best results.

Your Professional Title
(555) 123-4567
you@yourbusiness.com
www.yourbusiness.com

yourbusiness.com
How to use: Import these designs into Canva (free) or any design tool. Replace placeholder text with your information. For printing, export as PDF at 300 DPI or use a professional printing service like Vistaprint, MOO, or GotPrint.
Business Card Templates | "I Need Customers This Week" Premium Edition
